global.settingsHeader: Switch between focused setting groups to keep configuration lighter and easier to scan.

ui.title: Configure Insight Groups
ui.description: Create groups to categorize your activities. The engine will use these rules to generate personalized insights.

persona.name: Analyze as Persona
persona.desc: Choose the analytical model to apply to this group.

mutedProjects.name: Muted Projects
mutedProjects.desc: Mute specific projects (case-sensitive, exact match) to exclude them from Habit Consistency checks.

subprojectKeywords.name: Matching Sub-project Keywords
subprojectKeywords.desc: Add keywords that will match if found anywhere in a sub-project.

mutedSubprojectKeywords.name: Muted Sub-project Keywords
mutedSubprojectKeywords.desc: Mute activities by keyword. If a sub-project contains any of these (case-insensitive) keywords, it will be excluded from Habit Consistency checks.

unsavedChanges.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChanges.message: You have unsaved changes. Would you like to save them before closing?

ui.folderSelectPlaceholder: Select a folder with your time tracking files...

analyser.subtitle: Interactive analysis of your time tracking data

demo.title: DEMO MODE
demo.description: You are exploring sample ChronoAnalyser data. Configure your own insight groups to switch permanently to live data.

analyser.clickNextTip: Click to see the next tip

insights.title: 💡 Insights
insights.placeholder: Click "Generate Insights" to analyze your data.

tooltips.categorywise: Visualize how time is distributed across different categories.
tooltips.timeSeries: Visualize how time spent changes over a period.
tooltips.activity: Identify patterns in when tasks are typically performed.
tooltips.dayOfWeek: Displays a bar chart showing the total hours spent on each day of the week.
tooltips.hourOfDay: Displays a bar chart showing the total hours associated with tasks that start in each hour of the day.
tooltips.heatmap: Displays a heatmap where rows are days of the week, columns are hours of the day, and the color intensity of each cell represents the total hours for tasks starting at that specific day/hour combination.

notices.settingsUpdated: Full Calendar has updated your calendar settings to a new format.
notices.chronoAnalyserMobileDisabled: The ChronoAnalyser feature is only available on the desktop version of Obsidian.
notices.chronoAnalyserLoadFailed: Failed to load ChronoAnalyser. Please check the console.
notices.chronoAnalyserConfigureFirst: Please configure your Insight Groups first using the ⚙️ icon.
notices.chronoAnalyserGeneratingInsights: Generating insights (this may take a moment)...
notices.chronoAnalyserInsightsFailed: Failed to generate insights. Check the developer console for errors.
notices.chronoAnalyserDemoLoadFailed: Could not load the ChronoAnalyser demo. Falling back to live data.
notices.googleAuthFailed: Google authentication failed. Please try again.
notices.bulkUpdateError: Error during bulk update. Check console for details.
notices.timezoneChanged: System timezone changed to {{timezone}}. Full Calendar view updated to match.
notices.revalidationFailed: One or more remote calendars failed to load. Check the console for details.
notices.cannotOpenRemote: Cannot open note for a remote event.

bulkCategorization.noNotesFound: No local event notes found to categorize.

bulkDecategorization.noNotesFound: No local event notes found to de-categorize.

tasks.createViaPlugin: Use the Tasks plugin interface to create new tasks.
tasks.defaultValidation: This task cannot be scheduled on this date.
tasks.scheduledNoModal: Task scheduled, but could not open Tasks edit modal.
tasks.apiUnavailable: Obsidian Tasks plugin API not available.

tasknotes.addSourceFirst: Add a TaskNotes calendar source first, then return here to configure integration.
tasknotes.handoffSingleOnly: TaskNotes NLP handoff currently supports single events only.
tasknotes.handoffTitleRequired: TaskNotes NLP handoff requires a title.
tasknotes.handoffStartTimeRequired: TaskNotes NLP handoff requires a valid start time for timed events.
tasknotes.invalidSourceId: TaskNotes provider source ID must follow tasknotes_[n] pattern (received: {{sourceId}}).
tasknotes.createModalUnavailable: TaskNotes plugin is unavailable or does not expose create modal integration.
tasknotes.selectorUnavailable: TaskNotes plugin is unavailable or does not expose selector integration.

eventCache.calendarNotFound: Cannot add event: calendar with ID {{calendarId}} not found.
eventCache.providerNotFound: Cannot add event: provider for type {{type}} not found.
eventCache.readOnly: Cannot add event to a read-only calendar.
eventCache.createFailed: Failed to create event. Change has been reverted.
eventCache.deleteFailed: Failed to delete event. Change has been reverted.
eventCache.updateFailed: Failed to update event. Change has been reverted.
eventCache.movePartialSuccess: Event moved successfully, but some children may not have been moved.

recurEvents.deletedAndPromoted: Recurring event deleted and children promoted.
recurEvents.deletingWithChildren: Deleting recurring event and its {{count}} child override(s)...
recurEvents.deletedAll: Successfully deleted recurring event and all children.
recurEvents.preservingTiming: Preserving modified event timing and uncompleting task.
recurEvents.revertingControl: Reverting control to Main Recurring event sequence.
recurEvents.updatingChildren: Updating {{count}} child event(s) to match new parent title.
recurEvents.updateError: Error updating recurring event. Some children may not have been updated.
recurEvents.movingChildren: Moving {{count}} child event(s) to the new calendar.

general.label: General
general.description: General behavior, reminders, and recent updates.

appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize calendar appearance, time formats, and visibility.

calendars.label: Calendars
calendars.description: Manage calendar sources and provider-specific configuration.

organization.label: Organization
organization.description: Organize views with workspaces and event categorization.

integrations.label: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external services like Google, Outlook, and ActivityWatch.

desktopInitialView.label: Desktop initial view
desktopInitialView.description: Choose the initial view range on desktop devices.

mobileInitialView.label: Mobile initial view
mobileInitialView.description: Choose the initial view range on mobile devices.

displayTimezone.label: Display timezone
displayTimezone.description: Choose the timezone for displaying events. Defaults to your system timezone. Changing this will reload the calendar.

clickToCreateEvent.label: Click on a day in month view to create event
clickToCreateEvent.description: Switch off to open day view on click instead.

enableDefault.label: Enable default reminder
enableDefault.description: Automatically add a reminder to new events.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.highlightCurrentOrNextEventDesc: Highlights the current timed event, or the immediate next timed event if none is active.

firstDay.label: Starting day of the week
firstDay.description: Choose what day of the week to start.

timeFormat24h.label: 24-hour format
timeFormat24h.description: Display the time in a 24-hour format.

enable.label: Enable business hours
enable.description: Highlight your working hours in time-grid views to distinguish work time from personal time.

days.label: Business days
days.description: Select which days of the week are business days.

startTime.label: Business hours start time
startTime.description: When your working day begins (format: HH:mm)

endTime.label: Business hours end time
endTime.description: When your working day ends (format: HH:mm)

slotMinTime.label: Earliest time to display
slotMinTime.description: Set the earliest time visible in time grid views (format: HH:mm)

slotMaxTime.label: Latest time to display
slotMaxTime.description: Set the latest time visible in time grid views (format: HH:mm)

allDaySlot.label: Show all-day row (week/day views)
allDaySlot.description: Toggle the all-day row at the top of week and day time-grid views.

timeGridDayHeaderFormat.label: Week/day header date format
timeGridDayHeaderFormat.description: Choose how day labels are displayed in week and day views.

weekends.label: Show weekends
weekends.description: Whether to display weekend days (Saturday and Sunday) in the calendar

hiddenDays.label: Hidden days
hiddenDays.description: Select days of the week to hide from the calendar

dayMaxEvents.label: Max events per day (month view)
dayMaxEvents.description: Limit the number of events shown per day in month view

enableBackgroundEvents.label: Enable background events
enableBackgroundEvents.description: Allow events to be displayed as background elements for things like vacations, focus time, or class schedules.

showEventInStatusBar.label: Show current event in status bar
showEventInStatusBar.description: Display the title of the currently running event in the Obsidian status bar.

milestones.label: Milestones
milestones.description: Read-only local milestones that track successful event activity across calendars.

modal.title: Milestones
modal.description: Milestones are anonymous, local, and read-only. They unlock as successful actions are completed.

remoteArchitect.title: Remote Architect
remoteArchitect.description: Create 500 events across ICS, CalDAV, and Google providers.

taskOrchestrator.title: Task Orchestrator
taskOrchestrator.description: Create 1,000 events through Tasks + TaskNotes integrations.

polyglotBuilder.title: Polyglot Builder
polyglotBuilder.description: Reach 500 created events in 3 different provider types.

cycleMaster.title: Cycle Master
cycleMaster.description: Reach both 500 created and 500 deleted events.

habitualPlanner.title: Habitual Planner
habitualPlanner.description: Perform calendar actions on 20 consecutive days.

dedicated.title: The Dedicated
dedicated.description: Maintain at least 3 months between first and latest recorded action.

globalCitizen.title: Global Citizen
globalCitizen.description: Create events in 3 or more different time zones.

syncSpecialist.title: Sync Specialist
syncSpecialist.description: Maintain 5 or more active remote calendars (Google/ICS/CalDAV).

perfectionist.title: The Perfectionist
perfectionist.description: Have a perfect week with at least 3 created events every day Monday-Sunday.

digitalLibrarian.title: Digital Librarian
digitalLibrarian.description: Maintain over 10,000 non-deleted events across local calendars.

heading.label: Heading
heading.description: Heading to store events under in the daily note.

zeroConfig.label: Zero Configuration Required
zeroConfig.description: This provider automatically reads your existing Obsidian Tasks plugin settings. All tasks with due dates will be displayed on the calendar as read-only events.

readOnly.label: Events
readOnly.description: Event Edits happen directly in the Tasks Model and not the Full Calendar Edit Modal.

zeroConfig.label: Zero Configuration Required
zeroConfig.description: This provider reads TaskNotes tasks directly from your vault and maps scheduled tasks to calendar events.

dispatchMode.label: NLP Dispatch Endpoint
dispatchMode.description: Choose where Full Calendar forwards TaskNotes-targeted NLP requests.

readOnly.label: Events
readOnly.description: Event edits open the TaskNotes editor. Drag-and-drop updates scheduled date and duration without showing a modal.

enable.label: Enable advanced categorization (Title-based)
enable.description: Enable category-based coloring and unlock timeline views. This will modify event note titles and allow timeline visualization by category.

disable.modalDescription: Choose how to disable this feature. You can disable without cleanup to preserve event titles and saved category settings, or disable and clean up to remove known category prefixes and saved category colors.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.description: Create and manage calendar workspaces. Each workspace can have its own view settings, visible calendars, and filters.

quickStart.description: To begin, add a calendar source using the "+" button in the "Manage calendars" section.

modal.title: What's New in FCR
modal.donationMessage: FCR is built at high velocity with AI-augmented engineering. If this has provided value to you, consider contributing to $25/month subsidy to help keep this pace sustainable.

loadOlder.errorOffline: Failed to load older versions. You may be offline.

utils.timelineDisabled: Timeline view is disabled. Resetting default desktop view to "Week".

warnings.oneDailyNote: Only one daily note is allowed.

enable.label: Enable ActivityWatch Sync
enable.description: Periodically pull data from your local ActivityWatch instance.

sync.targetNotSet: Activitywatch sync: target calendar not set. Please configure in settings.
sync.targetNotFoundOrReadOnly: Activitywatch sync: target calendar ({{calendarId}}) not found or read-only.
sync.enabledPrompt: Activitywatch enabled. Please configure the target calendar by clicking the gear icon.

tasksIntegration.title: Obsidian Tasks Integration
tasksIntegration.description: Configure how Full Calendar schedules tasks from the Tasks backlog.

backlogDateTarget.label: Backlog filter date field
backlogDateTarget.description: Choose which Tasks date marker the backlog tracks. The backlog shows tasks missing this selected date marker.

calendarDisplayDateTarget.label: Calendar display date field
calendarDisplayDateTarget.description: Choose which Tasks date marker Full Calendar uses to display Tasks events. There is no fallback to other date markers. Restart Obsidian or reload the plugin for this change to fully take effect.

openEditModalAfterBacklogDrop.label: Open Tasks edit modal after backlog drop
openEditModalAfterBacklogDrop.description: Open the Obsidian Tasks edit modal immediately after dragging a task from the backlog onto the calendar.

taskDisplayFormat.label: Task time format
taskDisplayFormat.description: Choose how Full Calendar writes time into Tasks lines.

tasknotesIntegration.title: TaskNotes Integration
tasknotesIntegration.descriptionConfigured: Configure how NLP dispatches to TaskNotes.
tasknotesIntegration.descriptionMissingSource: TaskNotes integration is available. Add a TaskNotes calendar source to configure it.
tasknotesIntegration.noSource: Add a TaskNotes calendar source first before configuring TaskNotes integration.

source.label: TaskNotes Calendar Source
source.description: Select which TaskNotes calendar source to configure.

dispatchMode.label: NLP Dispatch Endpoint
dispatchMode.description: Choose whether Full Calendar should open TaskNotes search NLP or create NLP.

footer.message: Do you like what you see?

reminder.snoozeWarningBody: This is a default reminder. Snoozing will move the event start time forward.

errors.createNoCalendars: Cannot create event: No writable calendars are available.
errors.parentNotFound: Could not find the parent recurring event.

confirmations.editParentMessage: This property is inherited from the parent recurring event. Would you like to open the parent to make changes?

tooltips.recurringTaskCompletion: Completion for recurring tasks can be toggled on individual instances in the calendar view.
tooltips.dailyNoteRecurring: Recurring events are not supported in Daily Notes. Please use a 'Full Note' calendar instead.

deleteRecurring.title: Delete Recurring Event
deleteRecurring.description: This is a recurring event. What would you like to do with all of its future "override" instances (i.e., events that you have dragged or modified)?

deleteInstance.name: Delete only this instance
deleteInstance.description: Delete only the instance on {{date}}. This will skip this date in the recurrence.

promoteChildren.name: Promote child events
promoteChildren.description: Turn all overriden events (if any) into standalone, single events. They will no longer be linked to this recurring series.

deleteAll.name: Delete child events
deleteAll.description: Delete all future override events associated with this recurring series. This cannot be undone.

name.label: Name
name.description: A unique name for this workspace

defaultDate.label: Default date (optional)
defaultDate.description: Date to jump to when activating workspace (e.g., "today", "2024-01-01")

visibleCalendars.label: Visible calendars
visibleCalendars.description: Select which calendars to show (leave empty to show all)
visibleCalendars.noCalendars: No calendars configured. Configure calendars in the main settings first.

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: Select categories to include/exclude (leave empty to show all)
categories.noCategories: No categories configured. Configure categories in the Categorization settings.
categories.requiresAdvanced: Category filtering requires Advanced Categorization to be enabled in the main settings.

notices.enableBases: Please enable the Obsidian Bases plugin first.

overrideBusinessHours.label: Override business hours
overrideBusinessHours.description: Enable custom business hours for this workspace

enableBusinessHours.label: Enable business hours
enableBusinessHours.description: Show business hours highlighting in this workspace

businessDays.label: Business days
businessDays.description: Select which days of the week are business days

businessHoursStart.label: Business hours start time
businessHoursStart.description: When your working day begins (format: HH:mm)

businessHoursEnd.label: Business hours end time
businessHoursEnd.description: When your working day ends (format: HH:mm)

timelineCategories.label: Timeline categories
timelineCategories.description: Default state for timeline category groups

slotMinTime.label: Earliest time to display
slotMinTime.description: Override the earliest time visible in time grid views (format: HH:mm)

slotMaxTime.label: Latest time to display
slotMaxTime.description: Override the latest time visible in time grid views (format: HH:mm)

weekendDisplay.label: Weekend display
weekendDisplay.description: Override whether to show weekends in the calendar

hiddenDays.label: Hidden days
hiddenDays.description: Override which days to hide from the calendar

dayMaxEvents.label: Max events per day (month view)
dayMaxEvents.description: Override the maximum number of events to show per day in month view

bulkCategorize.title: Choose a Bulk-Update Method
bulkCategorize.description: How would you like to automatically categorize existing events in your local calendars? Note that this is a one time operation that will modify your event notes to match the required formatting.

smartFolder.name: Use Parent Folder (Smart)
smartFolder.description: Use parent folder names as the category for UN-categorized events. Events that already look like 'Category - Title' will be skipped.

forcedFolder.name: Use Parent Folder (Forced)
forcedFolder.description: PREPENDS the parent folder name to ALL event titles, even if they already have a category. Warning: This creates nested categories.

forcedDefault.name: Forced Default Update
forcedDefault.description: Prepends a category you provide to ALL event titles. If a category already exists, the new one will be added in front (e.g., New - Old - Title).

strategy.title: Sync Strategy
strategy.autoDescription: Manual and automatic syncs update the last checked time.
strategy.customDescription: Debug-only manual range. It never updates the last checked time and cannot run automatically.

profiles.title: Context Profiles (Best-Fit FSM)
profiles.name: Profile Name
profiles.primaryEvidenceRules: Primary Evidence Rules (Can start and sustain sessions)
profiles.supportingEvidenceRules: Supporting Evidence Rules (Can sustain, but cannot start)
profiles.hardBreakRules: Hard Break Rules (Instantly end the session)

auth.authFailed: Could not authenticate calendar. Please try re-adding it in settings.
auth.popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Please allow popups for Obsidian.

google.title: Google Accounts

enable.label: Use custom Google Cloud credentials
enable.description: Use your own OAuth Client ID and Secret instead of the default. Plugin currently stands verified by Google, but you may still use this option.

outlook.title: Outlook Accounts

enable.label: Use custom Microsoft credentials
enable.description: Use your own Microsoft Client ID and proxy URL instead of the built-in defaults.

clientId.label: Microsoft Client ID
clientId.description: OAuth app Client ID used for Microsoft login.

proxyUrl.label: Vercel proxy URL
proxyUrl.description: Base URL for your Microsoft token proxy (for example: https://your-app.vercel.app).

outlook.noAccounts: No Outlook accounts connected. Add an Outlook calendar in Calendars to connect one.

selectCalendars.description: Choose which Outlook calendars you would like to add to Obsidian.

errors.cacheNotLoaded: Full Calendar event cache not loaded.

errors.moveRecurringInstanceError: Cannot move a recurring instance to a different day. You can only change the time.

authorization.permissionsLabel: Select which permissions to grant. You can change these later in settings.

nlp.placeholder: e.g., tomorrow at 4pm Team standup, open settings, go to next tuesday
nlp.previewHint: Type a command — create events, navigate views, open settings, and more.
nlp.noCalendars: No writable calendars available. Please add a calendar first.

descriptions.OPEN_SETTINGS: Opens the Full Calendar settings tab.
descriptions.SHOW_MILESTONES: Opens the milestones page in settings.
descriptions.RESET_CACHE: Clears and rebuilds the event cache.
descriptions.REVALIDATE_REMOTE: Forces a fresh sync of all remote calendars.

notices.awNotEnabled: ActivityWatch is not enabled. Enable it in settings first.
